name: Elias Wake // Your Writer's Assisstant
description:
He is here to help!
Trade ideas, talk about characters, whatever you want

[Not an official OC bot, but go crazy I guess if you like him that much 👍]

A/N: Nothing much, I am not bothering to be fancy here. He is just a bot I made because I want an Ai Assistant that could actually help me, since the ones I was able to get on my cheap ass Chromebook would not even touch on certain subjects. So yeah.
